chapters.title: The Bridge Was Already Moving
chapters.rail_summary: A collapse that began as ordinary motion turned into a feedback problem.
chapters.story_anchor: Opening collapse, premise, and why this is not a freak-storm story.
chapters.visual_behavior: Start from the kept down-shot; slow deck-roll drift is visible before the first stable rail state lands.

chapters.title: The Redesign Removed Stiffness
chapters.rail_summary: The bridge became slender, elegant, cheaper, and more flexible.
chapters.story_anchor: Clark Eldridge proposal, Leon Moisseiff redesign, plate-girder shallowing, and 39-foot roadway context.
chapters.visual_behavior: Rail transition tightens around deck geometry; source plate remains unwarped outside approved transform drift.

chapters.title: Galloping Became Normal
chapters.rail_summary: Drivers watched the roadway rise and fall until motion became part of the bridge identity.
chapters.story_anchor: The bridge opened July 1, 1940, and almost immediately moved.
chapters.visual_behavior: Wave amplitude in the crop path increases subtly; car and human story elements stay anonymous and scale-giving.

chapters.title: Five Conditions Before The Cable
chapters.rail_summary: The failure chain was already being assembled before the bridge opened.
chapters.story_anchor: Five-condition setup: slenderness, solid sides, wind exposure, missing aerodynamic testing, and motion feeding force.
chapters.visual_behavior: Four understated rail emphasis pulses mark conditions without drawing diagrams over the bridge image.

chapters.title: The Air Fed The Twist
chapters.rail_summary: Torsion changed the airflow, and the airflow added energy back into torsion.
chapters.story_anchor: Self-excited torsional flutter and large bridge-deck twist.
chapters.visual_behavior: Source-safe deck roll is strongest here; no cyan traces, no diagnostic vectors, no invented collapse debris.

chapters.title: The Profession Changed
chapters.rail_summary: The bridge fell, and bridge engineering changed its questions.
chapters.story_anchor: Investigations, wind-tunnel testing, deck shape, damping, torsional stiffness, and aeroelastic design.
chapters.visual_behavior: Motion settles from high torsion toward a calmer archival-read plate, with rail copy carrying the lesson.

chapters.title: The Model Had An Edge
chapters.rail_summary: The equations were not useless. They were incomplete outside their domain.
chapters.story_anchor: Model-boundary synthesis: the world supplied a force the model had not named.
chapters.visual_behavior: The rail quiets; source drift becomes almost imperceptible to keep attention on the synthesis.

chapters.title: How Engineering Learns
chapters.rail_summary: Engineering learns by finding the edge of a model and rebuilding around it.
chapters.visual_behavior: Caption and rail fade before the full Paper Architecture outro and static end-screen target window.

effect_moments.treatment: image scale 1.024, slow y-translation and sub-degree roll over 36 seconds
increase deck-wave crop drift, rail active title snaps to Galloping Became Normal
rail-only condition cadence; no numbered full-frame cards and no out-of-rail text
strongest source-safe deck roll and localized rail shadow movement, no overlay vectors

effect_moments.trigger: the domain itself had an edge
effect_moments.treatment: motion amplitude eases down; rail contrast holds for synthesis copy

effect_moments.trigger: voice ends, Paper Architecture outro begins
effect_moments.treatment: suppress captions and rail story text before end-screen target geometry
